what_it_does: Defines a single RELATION_TYPE dict for the 'commented_on' board edge: a directed edge from a comment/feedback board item to any addressed target (image://, board://, code://, decision://), with inverse 'has_comment' and a label 'commented-on'.
observations: Module-level RELATION_TYPE constant only; no functions or classes.
desc encodes the usage workflow: file a board item whose body is the comment plus links=[{kind:'commented_on', target:'image://<id>'}], then reverse_traverse the target to gather every comment on it.
Names a concrete use case: the image-review workflow (compare + annotate).
standouts: The desc carries an operational recipe (how to file and how to reverse-traverse), not just a definition.
Targets are address-scheme-agnostic (image://, board://, code://, decision://).
conventions: Follows the board_edges relation-type pattern: a flat RELATION_TYPE dict with id/directed/label/inverse/desc.
Uses the addressed-resource URI scheme (scheme://<id>) consistently.
notes: A one-dict edge definition declaring the review/critique relation linking a comment item to whatever it comments on.
questions: Where is reverse_traverse implemented and how does it consume 'inverse'?
What enforces that the link kind string matches the relation id?
purpose_vs_actual: Match: the docstring-style desc describes a comment->target review edge and the dict declares exactly that.
apparent_themes: First-class typed relations on a board
Reverse traversal as the gather mechanism
intention_signals: Trying to make 'comment about X' a queryable graph edge so all feedback on an artifact can be collected by traversing back from the target.
novelty: The directed comment edge spans heterogeneous address schemes and pairs an explicit forward/inverse name for review-collection.
contribution: Contributes the typed comment/critique edge and its has_comment inverse, plus the documented reverse-traverse review-gathering pattern for any addressed artifact.
summary_for_embedding: A board relation-type definition for 'commented_on', a directed comment-to-target edge (inverse has_comment) used to attach and gather feedback on any addressed artifact.
intention_for_embedding: To represent review/critique comments as first-class graph edges so all comments on an artifact can be collected via reverse traversal.
